summary: Local filesystem image browser. List scans configured root dir(s) for image files; file stream serves a single asset by base64url id. Path-traversal guard is LEXICAL (path.resolve), not symlink-safe realpath.
dispatchRef: list L1433-L1443; file L1588-L1609; readLocalAssets L1103-L1185

methods.other: DISCREPANCY — no method guard. POST/PUT/DELETE to the list or file path returns the same 200 response as GET. See discrepancy note.

scenarios.name: list 200 (empty/nonexistent root)
scenarios.note: When root dir absent, existingRoots=[] → assets=[], root falls back to '~/Desktop/images'. NOT live-captured: the capture run points MIVO_ASSET_DIR at a temp dir with an asset to exercise the file-serving path; the empty variant is the same code path with an absent dir.

scenarios.name: list 200 (with asset)
scenarios.condition: MIVO_ASSET_DIR set to temp dir containing a .svg/.png

scenarios.name: file 200 (image stream)
scenarios.sourceRef: L1600-L1603; mimeForFile L114-L135; sendImageBuffer pattern L1056-L1060

scenarios.name: file path-traversal → 403

expected.body: Asset path is outside allowed roots

scenarios.discrepancy: Plan §6.1 says 'realpath 校验+去重' but isInsideRoot (L154-L157) uses LEXICAL path.resolve, NOT fs.realpath. fs.realpath is used only for dedup in the LISTING path (L1114, L1153), NOT for the file-serving guard. A symlink inside the root pointing outside would escape. BFF should use fs.realpath for the serving guard too — security gap vs plan claim. Also: 403 response has NO Content-Type header and plain-text body (L1595-L1597 sets neither) — inconsistent with JSON error shape elsewhere.

scenarios.name: list 500 on stat error (non-dir configured root)
scenarios.condition: MIVO_ASSET_DIR points to a path that errors during readdir

scenarios.name: non-GET method on list/file → same 200 (no guard)
scenarios.sourceRef: L1433-L1443 (no method check); L1588-L1609 (no method check)
scenarios.discrepancy: No 405 for non-GET. Plan §6.1 '非常规方法... 保持 dev 行为或统一 405 需列为有意变更' — current dev behavior is 'any method works'. BFF may add 405 (intended-change candidate).

invariants: dedup key = realpath(filePath).toLowerCase() in listing (L1153, L1157-L1159)
mimeForFile sniffs magic bytes (RIFF/WEBP, PNG, JPEG, GIF, SVG) before falling back to extension (L114-L135)
